case_title: FLOR ACOSTA VS. MARTIN G. GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,280.00 FILED BY ACOSTA, FLOR AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MARTIN G. DBA KING'S REFRIGERATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, FLOR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 <WAIVED>) SERVED MAY-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MARTIN G. DBA KING'S REFRIGERATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-30-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT PAID $400.00 IN CASH TO THE CREDITOR IN COURT TODAY. DEFENDANT WILL DELIVER TO CREDITOR COMMERCIAL SPEED-CLEAN WASHER OR GENERAL ELECTRIC WASHER BY JUNE 16, 2014. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MARTIN G. DBA KING'S REFRIGERATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2014 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO JUL-28-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOMEZ, MARTIN G. DBA KING'S REFRIGERATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID LOUGHLIN--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
